overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night, featuring futuristic neon-lit architecture, holographic advertisements, and light vehicular traffic. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow taxi with illuminated headlights driving along the curved multi-lane road

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway with support beams spanning across the street
large holographic advertisements with red and white neon lighting attached to the overhead structure
black metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the street
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk beneath a massive elevated highway in a cyberpunk city. The camera follows a character along a wet concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, with futuristic vehicles passing on the left. Neon holographic billboards illuminate the underside of the overpass, casting colored reflections on the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with neon-lit commercial facades

events.description: exits the covered highway underpass into open air with clear view of illuminated cherry blossom tree

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past brightly lit commercial storefronts and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large tree with pink illuminated blossoms visible against the night sky
tall modern buildings with glass facades displaying bright neon signage and advertisements
tall street lights with green neon accent lighting lining the road
vertical pole with illuminated traffic signals showing green lights

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a more open urban environment. A prominent cherry blossom tree with pink lights becomes visible ahead, while the right side features tall commercial buildings covered in holographic neon advertisements. The elevated highway structure recedes behind as the character continues walking along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection corner with multi-lane traffic

events.description: slows down and turns left toward the intersection while observing oncoming traffic
futuristic sedan drives through the intersection in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: slowing to a halt at the street corner and turning to face the intersection traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan with bright headlights approaching and passing through the intersection

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with crosswalk markings and traffic signals controlling vehicle flow
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The character slows to a stop at a street corner, turning to face the multi-lane intersection. The view opens up to show the wide asphalt road with crosswalk markings, while futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection. The surrounding buildings and cherry tree fall behind as the camera focuses on the traffic and road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered underside of a massive highway into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with a steady walk along a wet concrete sidewalk, where holographic billboards cast vibrant colored reflections across the rain-slicked pavement beneath the overpass. As the camera emerges from the shadow of the highway, the environment opens up to reveal tall commercial buildings draped in neon advertisements and a glowing pink cherry blossom tree. The scene then shifts as the character slows to a stop at a street corner, turning away from the greenery to face a multi-lane intersection. Finally, the view expands across the wide asphalt road and crosswalks, focusing on the flow of futuristic vehicles passing through the heart of the city.
